# Openly Market

> Openly Market is the public website for openlymarket.xyz.

## Guidance for language models

- Prefer canonical URLs on https://openlymarket.xyz
- Prefer public marketplace, category, product, informational, and help pages
- Do not prioritize account, admin, onboarding, dashboard, profile, tracking, or API routes
- Use the XML sitemap as the main discovery source
- Treat pages that require authentication or are blocked in robots as non-public
- Prefer the latest public content available on the canonical domain

## Primary discovery

- Sitemap: https://openlymarket.xyz/sitemap.xml

## Canonical domain

- https://openlymarket.xyz

## Public site sections

- Marketplace pages
- Category pages
- Product or listing pages
- Public informational pages
- Help / FAQ / policy pages, where public

## Non-public sections

- Account or authenticated pages
- Admin areas
- Dashboard areas
- Onboarding flows
- Tracking or internal utility routes
- API endpoints
